steps.t: The ruins of Ost Thondol can be found atop the hill, north-west of Pothlorn. Pothlorn asked you to search the ruins of Ost Thondol for the evil he sen…
Pothlorn is hiding among the rocks at the base of the hill, south-east of Ost Thondol. You should return to Pothlorn and let him know what you discove…
Elladan is at Thorenhad, north-west of Pothlorn's hiding place. Pothlorn told you to return to Elladan and tell him what you discovered.
